sourceRef: tip:When a benefit runs out mid-term

slides.headline: When a benefit runs out mid-term
slides.body: The conversation to have early, not late.

slides.headline: Identify the benefit
slides.body: Determine which VA benefit is at risk.

slides.headline: Calculate remaining time
slides.body: Estimate how much time remains until the benefit expires.
bullets: Refer to the relevant VA guidance

slides.headline: Communicate with the student
slides.body: Inform the student about the upcoming benefit end.

slides.headline: Plan for continuation
slides.body: Explore options for extending the benefit.
Ready to start the conversation? Link in bio.
slides.headline: Read the full post

outline.caption: When a benefit runs out mid-term: The conversation to have early, not late. Identify the benefit, review the end date, calculate remaining time, communicate with the student, and plan for continuation. Ready to start the conversation? Link in bio.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 3, 'Calculate remaining time', as the text is slightly small and could be more readable with a larger font size.
